children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system

global_vars.description: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

data_operations.description: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

constraints.description: Patient ID must be unique across all patients

acceptance_criteria.description: New patient record is stored in patients data store with unique ID

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient

global_vars.description: Check slot availability and store new appointment

data_operations.description: Check slot availability and store new appointment

constraints.description: Appointment slot must not be double-booked

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment is stored in appointments data store with unique ID and no slot conflict

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a patient

global_vars.description: Verify patient exists and fetch medical records

data_operations.description: Verify patient exists and fetch medical records

constraints.description: Records must be returned without modification

acceptance_criteria.description: Medical records are returned from patients data store without side effects

global_vars.description: Verify patient exists and update profile fields

data_operations.description: Verify patient exists and update profile fields

constraints.description: Only specified fields are updated; other fields remain unchanged

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is updated in patients data store with only specified fields changed

governance_notes: All governance and resource fields derived from Stage 2 internal_leaf_accesses. global_vars and data_operations are synchronized for each child. No Stage 1 or Stage 2 fields were modified.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: No signatures were changed; all signatures remain as defined in Stage 2.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: Each child's internal_leaf_accesses directly map to global_vars and data_operations entries. For example, RegisterPatient's 'patients read_write' maps to one global_var and one data_operation with the same op and description.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For every child, the set of global_vars entries matches the set of data_operations entries exactly in terms of resource, operation type, and description. No deliberate exceptions exist.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All resources referenced in internal_leaf_accesses (patients, appointments) are covered in global_vars and data_operations. No resource is missing or extra.
